pin_definitions.description: Input supply pin for LDO 1. A 10 µF or greater input capacitor is required.
Input supply pin for LDO 1. A 10 µF or greater input capacitor is required.
Ground pin. Must be connected to ground, the thermal pad, and each other with a low-impedance connection.
Input supply pin for LDO 2. A 10 µF or greater input capacitor is required.
Input supply pin for LDO 2. A 10 µF or greater input capacitor is required.
Enable pin for channel 2. Turns the regulator on and off.
Noise-reduction and soft-start pin for channel 2.
Soft-start control pin for channel 2. Connect to GND or INx to allow normal or fast charging.
Open-drain power-good indicator pin for channel 2 output voltage.
Feedback pin connected to the error amplifier for channel 2.
Regulated output for LDO 2.
Regulated output for LDO 2.
Ground pin. Must be connected to ground, the thermal pad, and each other with a low-impedance connection.
Regulated output for LDO 1.
Regulated output for LDO 1.
Feedback pin connected to the error amplifier for channel 1.
Open-drain power-good indicator pin for channel 1 output voltage.
Soft-start control pin for channel 1. Connect to GND or INx to allow normal or fast charging.
Noise-reduction and soft-start pin for channel 1.
Enable pin for channel 1. Turns the regulator on and off.
Connect the thermal pad to a large-area ground plane. Internally connected to GND.

logical_pins.description: Enable pin for LDO 1. Connect to INx if not used.

logical_pins.description: Enable pin for LDO 2. Connect to INx if not used.
